title: ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Utility Fishing Fillet Knife, 6 Inch
description:
You won’t waste time processing your latest catch, using the ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Fishing Knife with Ergonomic Black Rubber Handle and Plastic Sheath. An excellent knife choice for filleting larger fresh and salt-water fish alike, including tilapia, salmon, snapper, tuna, snapper, carp, eel, bass, catfish and cod. High quality and durable, the ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Fishing Knife with Ergonomic Handle and Plastic Sheath will make fast work of messy tasks and is suitable to use for skinning, filleting, cleaning, boning or as a bait knife. Whether you’re bank fishing, kayak fishing, fly fishing or working on a commercial fishing boat, this utility fishing knife will always be up for the task at hand

ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Utility Fishing Fillet Knife, 6 Inch

You won’t waste time processing your latest catch, using the ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Fishing Knife with Ergonomic Black Rubber Handle and Plastic Sheath. An excellent knife choice for filleting larger fresh and salt-water fish alike, including tilapia, salmon, snapper, tuna, snapper, carp, eel, bass, catfish and cod.

Key Features

  • CUT AND CLEAN LIKE A PRO: High quality and durable, the ASR Outdoor fishing knife will make fast work of messy tasks and is suitable to use for skinning, filleting, cleaning, boning or as a bait knife; whether you’re bank fishing, kayak fishing, fly fishing or working on a commercial fishing boat, this utility fishing knife will always be up for the task at hand
  • MULTIPURPOSE KNIFE: Cooking, hunting, camping, fishing, baking and more, the ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Fishing Knife with Ergonomic Black Rubber Handle is an excellent companion for all the aforementioned, the thin blade allows for effortless maneuvering to easily remove meat without loss
  • ERGONOMIC SLIP RESISTANT GRIP: Handling sharp blades in wet conditions is less than ideal but, with a comfortable rubber handle with ergonomic grip grooves that fits in either hand, plus a pronounced trigger grip built right into the handle, you’ll be cutting smoothly and safely with each and every catch
  • DURABLE PROTECTIVE SHEATH: To protect the knife when not employed, the ASR Outdoor fixed blade fishing knife comes with a heavy-duty plastic sheath to keep it safe and to avoid injuries; the sheath also features a convenient hanging hook or additional holding handle if needed
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Knife Dimensions: 11 inches long; Blade Dimensions: 6 inches long; Material: Steel blade, plastic sheath

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROPKFISH7SH
  • UPC: 810058484383
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 13.25 in

High quality and durable, the ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Fishing Knife with Ergonomic Handle and Plastic Sheath will make fast work of messy tasks and is suitable to use for skinning, filleting, cleaning, boning or as a bait knife. Whether you’re bank fishing, kayak fishing, fly fishing or working on a commercial fishing boat, this utility fishing knife will always be up for the task at hand.

Cooking, hunting, camping, fishing, baking and more, the ASR Outdoor fishing knife is an excellent companion for all the aforementioned, as the thin blade allows for effortless maneuvering to easily remove meat without loss. And, as any fishermen knows, handling sharp blades in wet conditions is less than ideal but, with a comfortable rubber handle with ergonomic grip grooves that fits in either hand, plus a pronounced trigger grip built right into the handle, you’ll be cutting smoothly and safely with each and every catch!

Lastly, to protect the knife when not employed, the ASR Outdoor fixed blade fishing knife comes with a heavy-duty plastic sheath to keep it safe and to avoid injuries; the sheath also features a convenient hanging hook or additional holding handle if needed.
